title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXXXV. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Jack and Jill went up the hill,
            To fetch a pail of water;
        Jack fell down, and broke his crown,
            And Jill came tumbling after.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXXXV. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
